hotel_name: Căn hộ cao cấp Mường Thanh Đà Nẵng (Muong Thanh Da Nang Luxury Apartment)

reviews.title: Chủ nhà tệ hại.
reviews.text:
Nhận khách cũng nhanh và đuổi khách cũng nhanh.
Phòng thuê không thuộc quản lý của tập đoàn mường thanh mà là của cư dân mua căn hộ xong cho thuê lại. Chỉ chăm chăm nhận tiền đuổi khách. Ya thức làm du lịch rất kém.

reviews.title: Gute Lage, schöne Aussicht
reviews.positives:
Die Lage ist toll.
Der Blick auf das Meer und auf die Stadt war ebenfalls schön.
+ grosser Kühlschrank
+ grösseres Wohn- Esszimmer
reviews.negatives:
Unser Apartment war schon älter,
Eine Renovation oder Auffrischung wäre notwendig. Ich würde dieses Apart. nicht nochmals mieten.
Das Apartment neben uns, auch zum vermieten, sah deutlich besser aus.

reviews.title: A bad experience!
reviews.text: When I got there, the apartment has been fully occupied, turned out this room was run by a random guy in this building, not the hotel itself so you’re not gonna know if the renting post is authentic or not, but there’s no heads-up about it and we ended up having to find another accommodation along the way.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Minh

First of all, I would like to thank you for taking the time to share your feedback about your experience. Reviews like yours are very important to us and provide us with valuable opportunities to improve our services. I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you may have experienced while searching for a place to stay.

I am sorry to hear that you were unable to stay at our property and that the information about the apartment was not clearly presented. This must have caused confusion and frustration for you, and I completely understand that feeling. We always want to bring the best experience to our guests, and it is very difficult for us when you are not satisfied.

We are committed to providing accurate and transparent information about all the properties we offer. However, in your case, it is clear that we have fallen short of this standard. We will review all information on our website to ensure that all properties are easily identifiable and clearly understood by

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: phòng xuống cấp cực kì, trần nhà vệ sinh rất rất bẩn, quạt hút không thể hoạt động nên nvs rất hôi khi lần đầu mở cửa, phòng ngủ có mùi ẩm mốc rất nồng. đồ dùng nhà bếp đều cũ và rỉ sét nhiều. sẽ không quay lại

reviews.title: Fake listing
reviews.text:
The apartment was not available, they will make excuses and try to move you to another place.
Don't book!!

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Vietnamese are very weak in English and difficult to communite. When we reached this apartment and no reception counter staff and only security but he didn't know English. My advise before come in Vietnam Da Nang city , pls try to communiticate with property , elese you will be suffer. The room is good for money and don't hope a lot facilities.  It very close to the beach.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.negatives: Phòng tắm sơ xài và cũ

reviews.title: Hotel review
reviews.text: Convenient location, quite nice. The rooms are clean. However, since it's an apartment, while we were staying there, someone came to view the room (probably because the owner listed it for sale), and there was even a real fire drill due to a fire on the fourth floor. Overall, it's fine aside from those two issues. Oh, and there's a floor for luggage if anyone has to check out before their flight time.

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.negatives: Nhà vệ sinh có mùi hôi

reviews.title: Apartment for vacationing families.
reviews.text: Beautiful location, close to the beach, surrounded by many supermarkets and restaurants. Reasonable prices. The host is friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Căn hộ sạch sẽ, chủ nhà rất nhiệt tình, căn hộ cạnh biển nên khá mát mẻ và tiện di chuyển.
reviews.negatives: Tắm biển về phải đi thang máy riêng nên hơi bất tiện một chút.

reviews.title: Apartment suitable for a family.
reviews.text: 2-bedroom apartment. However, if it's the apartment I'm staying in, it's wonderful (number 306) because it has just been renovated, is clean, and has a beautiful view of the entire city of Da Nang and the Son Tra peninsula. The washing machine and drying rack are very convenient, especially if you go swimming twice a day. There is a refrigerator to store food and drinks. There is no daily housekeeping, so you can clean the house yourself if you want it sand-free, but in return, you'll have privacy. You can buy groceries to cook as there is a kitchen and cooking utensils available. There are many restaurants around to choose from. If you want to go somewhere, you can book a ride with Xanh sm, and by the time you get down from the car, it will already be waiting for you. Enjoy the sunrise from the balcony or go down to the beach, which is very close, about 200m away. Swimming times in the morning should be from 5:00 to 5:15. In the afternoon, around 4:00 PM. Please pay attention to the check-in and check-out times as additional charges may apply. Inside the building is not new, and waiting for the elevator for a long time is a small downside.

reviews.title: Căn hộ tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Đây là lần thứ 3 mình đặt căn hộ ở đây mỗi lần đi công tác. Căn hộ rất tiện nghi và phù hợp với nhu cầu của mình đặc biệt là trong việc giặt giũ quần áo. Chủ nhà thì rất nhiệt tình. Chỉ lưu ý với mọi người là khi đặt thì nên liên hệ trước với chủ nhà để xem hình ảnh căn hộ mình sẽ nhận.

reviews.title: Danang Muong Thanh Apartment
reviews.text: There was a bit of difficulty during check-in, but after meeting the friendly manager, it was the start of a very good trip. The exterior looked a bit worn, but the interior was clean. From the third day, I saw a few ants, and by the fourth day, there were ants wandering around in various places. If you don't mind insects, I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Gần biển, thoáng mát, đầy đủ tiện nghi. Sẽ quay lại lần nữa.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The living room is spacious, with two separate bedrooms and two private restrooms. The kitchen has many utensils and a large refrigerator.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Mình rất thích vị trí của tòa nhà và thái độ phục vụ niềm nở của chủ nhà, đây là lần thứ 2 mình ở căn hộ này và mọi thứ đều hài lòng. Xin cảm ơn!

reviews.title: Best cost-performance ratio and location.
reviews.text: We used the connecting room with three people, and the price at 60,000 won per night was great, and the hygiene condition was also very good. There was not a single mold or insect, and the location was excellent as shown on the map.
reviews.response:
저희 아파트를 선택하시고 시간을 내어 귀하의 경험을 공유해 주셔서 감사합니다!

고객님께서 아파트의 합리적인 가격, 청결도, 편리한 위치에 만족하셨다니 기쁘게 생각합니다. 편안하고 깨끗한 숙박을 보장하는 것이 항상 최우선이며, 즐거운 시간을 보내셨다니 정말 기쁩니다.  

귀하의 다가오는 여행에서 귀하를 환영할 수 있는 기회가 있기를 바랍니다. 많은 건강과 기쁨을 기원합니다!

reviews.title: Căn hộ tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Căn hộ sạch sẽ. Vị trí thuận tiện, gần biển, rất phù hợp để nghỉ ngơi. Chủ nhà thân thiện, hỗ trợ nhiệt tình. Mình rất hài lòng.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: It's an apartment just behind Muong Thanh Hotel though it just a short walking distance to the beach. We stayed on level 28 so had to put up with residence using the lift everytime. Overall it's a good spot to stay in Da Nang. Host was friendly and responded well to our requests.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
НЕ РЕКОМЕНДУЮ 
1. В апартаментах душ просто висит над унитазом, соответсвенно в 1,5 м2 все время лужа 
2. Воды горячей нет 
3. Постельное белье отдельный кошмар - синтетика еще и закатанная 
4. Во второй спальне окно выходит в коридор и это постоянный шум 
5. Написали выселение в 12, в итоге пришли ща ключами в 14.00 и пришлось их ждать (это хорошо, что не выезжали , а переезжали ) 

Возможно для кого то такие вещи не существенны, просто обратите на это внимание 
Лучше на 100 м дальше от моря снять хорошие апартаменты с завтракам за меньшие деньги

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: A good place for friends to hang out.
reviews.text: All the utensils are provided, and I was pleasantly surprised to see the ocean, so my satisfaction was at its highest. It's nice to buy skewers from the nearby koi restaurant and have a little after-party before going to bed. The apartment has two entrances, and since the management is different, be sure to ask about it. I struggled a bit at first because I didn't know this.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 还不错，房东人很好，在岘港都是与电动车所以出行也很方便，整体不错

reviews.title: Perfect location and comfortable room satisfaction.
reviews.text: The beach and walking accessibility were excellent, and the room size and hot water were very satisfactory. Thanks to the cleanliness of the accommodation and the friendly attitude of the staff, I was able to have a comfortable time. Overall, it is excellent value for the price, has good amenities, and there are many places to eat nearby!

reviews.title: Amazing with great service.
reviews.text: The 2 bedroom unit we stayed in was perfect. Great location. I do have to say a special thank you to the owner. He was great and very helpful. I would definitely recommend this place to all.

reviews.title: Clean basic apartment in a great location
reviews.text: Would 100% stay hear again

reviews.title: Excellent accommodation for long trips and business trips!
reviews.text: First of all, it’s the apartment behind the Muong Thanh Hotel. This apartment is a bit older, but it seems the owner has managed it well, and if you mention any needs or inconveniences, they take care of it. The kind management lady responds well to cleaning and towel exchanges! I would recommend it. However, don’t expect it to be very bright and completely clean; I would say it’s good for living. I was very satisfied during my 4-day stay! There’s a security guard on duty, and they seem to prioritize safety. Also, it’s great because it’s right in front of the beach, and it’s easy to get to nearby good restaurants.

reviews.title: Excellent Host. Very Nice and very Co operative. Made us feel at Home.
reviews.text: At First The Lobby was not at all impressive and I really got annoyed  when we arrived. But when we met the Host and she took is to the room everything was looked so nice. We stayed 4 days there and enjoyed every bit of our stay. Thanks a Kot dear Hien.

reviews.title: Will be back.
reviews.text: I am lucky to have a super beautiful apartment, fully equipped, clean, in a great location with an amazing view. Everyone, please keep it nice for my next visit.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Just amazingly amazing 🤩 xxx to all staff

reviews.title: a cost-effective accommodation
reviews.text:
a good manager and considerate consideration
I left a good memory in my travel destination

reviews.title: Grand appartement, gâché par les fourmis
reviews.text: La personne qui nous accueilli a été extrêmement sympathique et l'appartement avait l'air agréable, malgré l'ambiance HLM du bâtiment. Cependant la cuisine était mal nettoyée, les fourmis apparaissaient dès qu'on posait quelque chose sur le plan de travail de la cuisine et surtout, le micro onde et la bouilloire était inutilisables (bouilloire pleine de fourmis). Lorsque les lézards ont commencé à apparaitre, nous avons décidé de partir après une nuit même si nous avions réservé plus. C'est dommage, l'accueil est parfait, l'appartement à du potentiel et si les finitions et propreté étaient gérées il pourrait être proposé à un prix supérieure avec des clients qui seraient quand même contents.
reviews.response:
Thank you, Imane, for taking the time to share your experience at our apartment.

We are truly sorry to hear that your stay was disrupted by cleanliness issues and the presence of ants in the kitchen area. This is not the standard we strive to maintain. Upon receiving your feedback, we immediately inspected the apartment and have since taken measures to improve cleanliness and eliminate any insect problems to prevent this from happening again.

We also appreciate your kind words about the warm welcome and the potential of the apartment. We are continuously working to improve our service quality, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a much better experience.

Wishing you good health and many enjoyable journeys ahead!

reviews.title: 아파트라서 예약 했는데 위생 상태가 별로입니다
reviews.text: 아파트가 오래된 아파트지 몰라도 집에 곰팡이 냄새에 잠을자면 기침이 나오고 위생 상태는 최악입니다 이불에는 머리카락이 많이 있고 이블도 위생상태가 별로입니다

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: 너무 더러워요. 개미와 바퀴벌레가 많고...가격대비 너무 더러운방! ! !
reviews.response: 안녕하세요. 먼저, 저희 아파트에 숙박해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 아파트가 기대에 부응하지 못해 매우 죄송합니다. 불꽃놀이 축제 기간 동안 객실이 과밀되었던 점에 대해 양해를 구하고자 위와 같은 상황을 전달드립니다. 죄송하며, 고객님과 게스트분들이 편안하고 쾌적한 숙박을 즐기실 수 있도록 위의 오류를 수정하도록 하겠습니다. 만나 뵙기를 바랍니다. 진심으로 감사드립니다.
